programme.title: Video Killed the Radio Star: Depeche Mode
programme.desc: Legendary DJ Rusty Egan and broadcaster Robert Elms discuss the music videos of Depeche Mode and the special relationship between the band and director Anton Corbijn.

programme.title: Jimi Hendrix: The Uncut Story: 1961-1967
programme.desc: As a sideman playing behind some of the biggest names in R&B, Jimi Hendrix started to make a name for himself in music. Not long after, the Jimi Hendrix Experience emerged as the hottest rock trio in New York and across the pond in swinging London.

programme.title: Thin Lizzy: Rocker on the Loose
programme.desc: Phil Lynott was Ireland's first rock and roll international superstar. His hard man image helped him stand out to the world as one of the most influential rockers of the 1970’s.

programme.title: Pop Profiles: Mark Ronson
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to one of the most iconic pop stars of our time: Mark Ronson. Mark Ronson's story is told chronologically through his major hit singles. New interviews add insight into the life of Mark Ronson.

programme.title: The Big Interview: R.E.M.'s Michael Stipe & Mike Mills
programme.desc: R.E.M.'s Mike Mills and Michael Stipe discuss their lives, careers, and the song Dan Rather inadvertently inspired.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Somebody walking there!
programme.desc: In this episode of the paranormal investigation series, the AYH team investigate a venue that has an intriguing history. Phil and Dale get a fright; Sara has a thought-provoking, emotional moment; and Jane becomes rather tongue-tied over it all.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "It came from near the door!"
programme.desc: The 'Are You Haunted' team travel to South Yorkshire to investigate a haunted building that dates to the late 18th century. With reports of a mysterious figure being seen, footsteps being heard, and possible poltergeist activity, how will they get on?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Who's that?"
programme.desc: The team head to the East Midlands, to another overnight paranormal investigation. With reports of objects moving on their own, a cursed voodoo doll, and unexplained figures seen, will the team be able to shed any light on these mysterious incidents?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Unfinished business
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted..? team are back with the first episode kicking of a brand new season. Three more venues are put before the team, only one will be investigated: but which one?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: There's something here!
programme.desc: The team returns to a venue that had them on edge during their first visit, and with good cause: footsteps, hissing, bangs, and whistling were all witnessed. This time Jane sees a mysterious figure and an uneasy presence is felt.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: There's knocking upstairs!
programme.desc: A ghostly lady, a spectral young boy, and other paranormal incidents are investigated by the Are You Haunted team at a former textile mill in West Yorkshire. Investigator Miki York once again joins the team for a night full of unexplained occurrences.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: The World's End
programme.desc: In this season finale, the team return to a venue which sees Jane and Dale witness a very strange incident. Phil and Ben are plagued by phantom footsteps, along with Sara and Jane. And Dale gets the shock of his life. But which venue is it?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Is anybody there?"
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team heads to Wales, where they are given rare access to a restricted part of a venue. What will the team find during their overnight investigation, in a building that stretches back hundreds of years?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Wish me luck!
programme.desc: A return to a venue that shocked everyone in series one; and this time there are only 3 team members. This investigation has nerve wracking consequences as loud bangs, the sound of doors slamming, voices, and knocking are all experienced.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Who's down there?
programme.desc: The team investigate a sprawling venue where apparitions, noises, and an unsavoury entity have been reported. Sara has an experience she won't forget. Dale gets a headache. And the entire team is mystified by a particular incident that keeps occurring.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Jason Williams
programme.desc: Jason Williams goes out to meet friends for a night of drinking. He never returns. His family is frantic, it’s uncharacteristic of him to be out of touch.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Vision of Murder
programme.desc: A quaint New Jersey town is rocked when a local nurse, Betty Cornish, is found bludgeoned to death in her apartment.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Psychic for the Defense
programme.desc: Investigators are perplexed when a gagged and mutilated body washes up on a Florida beach. The FBI is called in to help crack the gruesome case.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Margie Calciano
programme.desc: Detective Robert Wanner consults psychic Lauren Thibodeau to help with a case that has left him stumped. Surprisingly she instead offers clues on a cold case that’s been worrying Wanner for years.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: In small town Ohio, a respected state trooper reports his wife missing. Then he tells the police she’s run off with a secret lover. But has she?

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Amie Hoffman
programme.desc: Teenager Amie Hoffman disappears after work one night. Police are on the case but when a family friend calls psychic Nancy Weber, she sees Amie’s murder in a bizarre vision.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rachel Domas
programme.desc: Can a veteran psychic and a rookie cop crack a case of a missing fourteen-year-old girl? Rachel Domas misses her school bus and walks the 3 miles home. She’s never seen again.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Mark Green
programme.desc: Mark Green disappears one night without a trace. Police are stumped. There is no evidence. Diane Lazarus, a psychic in a nearby town, is holding a reading.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lawrence Mbroh
programme.desc: Lawrence Mbroh was in a dangerous business - he sold drugs. So when he disappears, his father Alfred is worried. Detective Pam Gray is investigating the case but can find no new leads.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rosa Talamantes
programme.desc: Can a psychic lead police to a body so they can convict a cold-blooded killer? Rosa Talamantes goes out for a drink with her boyfriend and never returns.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Forced Entry

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "That's so freaky!"

programme.desc: Bob Krueger is devastated to lose a race for the Senate. But nothing could protect his family from the obsession of a former staffer who now threatens to destroy them.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Stalked.com
programme.desc: After meeting online, Patrick begins to stalk Kristen across the web. Kristen begins to realize that nothing will stop her cyberstalker from tracking her down with deadly intentions.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Ties that Blind
programme.desc: Kathy is thrilled when her husband David treats her well, as he often beats her down with insults and abuse. When Kathy tries to escape her marriage, David is not about to let her go.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Power Play
programme.desc: Jane Haag rarely has time to date until she falls in love with Ron. But Jane discovers that Ron is a virtual time bomb about to explode.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: At first, Karen Welch thinks nothing of the mysterious call she receives on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: She-Devil
programme.desc: When Tom Donato's wife Kristin turns controlling, he vows to get a divorce. But Kristin exacts a terrible price for revenge and frames him as a dangerous stalker.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Death Spiral
programme.desc: Linda is hoping for love when she meets Jim, but his charm lasts only as long as he doesn't drink. Unable to stay sober, Jim becomes determined to keep Linda all to himself...even if it kills her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Teenage Obsession
programme.desc: When outgoing Cameron Wallace meets shy Ryan Clutter in a high school art class, they are only acquaintances. Little does she know that Ryan will stalk her for the next ten years.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Alberto Benitez is a successful police instructor in Kingsville, Texas. When he breaks up with his girlfriend, her obsession turns his life into a vicious game of survival.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Puppet Master
programme.desc: Christy Martin is the toughest female boxer in the world. But outside the ring, Christy deals with the fight of her life as she's blackmailed and abused by her husband...who is also her coach.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Rachel Wilson's marriage falls apart when husband Darrell starts hiring hookers. But when Rachel moves on and finds the perfect man, Darrell erupts in rage.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: When George Long's girlfriend demands they get married, he breaks off the relationship. But nothing can stop Cheryl's relentless obsession. If she can't marry him, nobody can.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Bachelor Number One
programme.desc: A handsome serial killer becomes infamous when he is chosen as the successful dating contestant on a popular game show

programme.title: Very Bad Men: To Kill And Kill Again
programme.desc: In March 1995, one nurse notices the average number of deaths at her Clinton, Indiana hospital has quadrupled over a two-year period. Soon, a male nurse with a sweet bedside manner becomes the centre of an intense police investigation

programme.title: Very Bad Men: An Eye For An Eye
programme.desc: A serial killer with a depraved obsession targets Texan prostitutes and surgically removes their eyeballs..

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Cold Blooded Charmer
programme.desc: A smooth-talking con man works his way into the affections of a small-town community, with brutal consequences

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Natural Born Killer
programme.desc: A daughter moves to a small town to be closer to her family only to lose them to a brutal killer.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Deadly Messiah
programme.desc: Under the guise of being God’s prodigy, a cult leader draws his followers into the bush with disastrous and deathly consequences.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Man Who Married Too Much
programme.desc: Two wives discover that they are married to the same man and take matters into their own hands.
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Married Too Much

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Conman Casanova
programme.desc: A mysterious conman targets beautiful women through an online dating service, plying his charms to win their affections, then robbing them blind.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Toybox Torturer
programme.desc: In 1999, women are disappearing from the streets of Albuquerque. When 22 year old Cynthia Jaramillo escapes her captors and tells police her story, they realize this is work of a sadistic sexual torturer who has been preying on women for decades..

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Lethal Lover
programme.desc: A playboy cruises the bars of Texas, seducing successful women with big bank accounts, while concealing his sinister intentions and a deadly weapon...

programme.title: Angry Planet: Thunder Down Under
programme.desc: In Australia George teams up with storm chaser Jimmy Deguara to witness summer storms in the outback. While in Oz, he dives the magnificent Great Barrier Reef, and explores just how painful is the sting of the venomous Box Jellyfish.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Avert an Asteroid Impact
programme.desc: Throughout history, the earth has been bombarded from space. Asteroid impacts have caused mass extinctions – including the dinosaur wipe out.
programme.sub-title: How To Avert an Asteroid Impact

programme.title: Naked Science: Making Mountains
programme.desc: The Rockies. Magnificent and awe-inspiring mysterious, the Rockies are one of the longest mountain ranges in the world. Naked Science investigates the geological processes that build these massive mountains.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of Tornado
programme.desc: Tornados are one of the most destructive forces of the planets with winds at 300 miles an hour. They can destroy buildings and hurl cars hundreds of feet through the air.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Naked Science: What's Wrong With Pluto
programme.desc: Naked Science investigates the violent cosmological forces that create planets and discover what it is that makes a planet a planet.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Wildfires
programme.desc: With flames roaring to heights of 50 meters or more and temperatures exceeding 1,200°C, the wildfire is one of Mother Nature’s most horrific killers. Wildfires show no signs of stopping and their inexorability on this planet is truly terrifying.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Blizzards
programme.desc: With ice, freezing temperatures, and ferocious winds — the Blizzard is one of Mother Nature’s most effective killing machines. They are typically associated with heavy snow, but may even occur when there is little or no snowfall.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Floods
programme.desc: Even when below your knees, you can still be swept off your feet by the torrent of water. And the danger doesn’t stop there: electric shocks, contaminated water and washed away vehicles are perilous.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Pandemics
programme.desc: With an ever more mobile world population, potentially growing in size to 11 billion people by the next century, public health experts agree that the possibility of a cataclysmic disease is more likely now than ever before.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Hurricanes
programme.desc: With a combination of torrential rain, powerful winds, and devastating storm surges, Hurricanes are among Mother Nature’s most calamitous natural disasters.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Winds Of Autumn
programme.desc: This year he starts off by getting prepared in a wind tunnel, then he and his chase partner Mark Robinson head to Newfoundland for more wild weather action. Then, it's off to another encounter where the wild wind fans a raging inferno.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Iceland: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: George meets President of Iceland Ólafur Grímsson who spearheaded use of geothermal power; visits Blue Lagoon and geysers; explores volcanically active Haimaey Island and climbs an iceberg calving off the glaciers at Vatnajokull Lagoon.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Avalanches
programme.desc: Whenever there is unstable snow and gravity, gravity always wins. George travels to the Rocky Mountains to learn about how to stay alive in the back country.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Venezuela Lightning
programme.desc: Gas from Catatumbo swamps mixed with cold air from the Andes create a perpetual lightning storm on South America's largest lake. From here George canoes 84 km to world's highest waterfall, swims with piranhas and holds a huge Anaconda.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Arctic Winter
programme.desc: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore frigid Canadian Arctic winter. The team uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head North through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Midwest Stormfest
programme.desc: This season the tornadoes begin early - in February. Through the season, George follows the big weather from Missouri west to the Dakotas, and dodges the huge, destructive Greensburg tornado in southern Kansas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Water
programme.desc: In this episode, George investigates the wild side of water in dangerous class 5 river rapids, a flooded cave, and even in the ocean surrounded by massive Great White Sharks.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Blizzards
programme.desc: Winter weather can be even more dangerous than thunderstorms and where else to explore the big chill than at the summit of Mount Washington which has the reputation as being the place with the "Worst weather in the world".

programme.title: Angry Planet: Defying Gravity
programme.desc: George experiences extremes of aviation and space training aboard Czech-built Albatross fighter jet, inside Zero-G plane, simulating zero gravity by diving 30,000 feet in giant parabolas and in spinning centrifuges producing 6 G's of force.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of A Hurricane
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: Naked Science: Inside The Mind Of Stephen Hawking
programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.
programme.sub-title: Inside The Mind Of Stephen Hawking

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: The Invisible Lizard
programme.desc: Nick’s on the chase through Madagascar. His quarry are Chameleons and Nick needs to find an invisible one to bust a few myths and uncover the remarkable mysteries about this king of lizards.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: The Frankenstein Fish
programme.desc: In the UK and Spain, Nick investigates stories of enormous cat fish terrorising the waters. But how does this fish get so enormous and why is it the environment agency’s public enemy number one?

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: Madagascar’s creepiest resident is the Aye Aye. It might look fluffy but somehow it instills terror into the hearts of the local population, enough to make them want to kill it on sight! But why?

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: The Mimic Octopus
programme.desc: Nick drops into one of the most bizarre dive sites in the world, in search of a very convincing disguise artist - the mimic octopus, capable of an incredible repertoire of 15 impersonations.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Leafy Sea Dragon
programme.desc: In the warm waters of South Australia Nick meets a marine animal with a jewel-like body that resembles a brilliant plastic toy rather than a fish; the Leafy Sea Dragon.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Worm Lizard
programme.desc: Nick Baker is on a road trip along Mexico's Highway Number 1 running the length of the weird and wonderful Baja peninsula. His aim- to track down Bipes biporus, aka the Five-toed Worm Lizard.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Axolotl
programme.desc: Mexico City might seem an unlikely place to find one of nature's most extraordinary amphibians; the Axolotl, an almost magical salamander that Nick Baker has kept in captivity for two decades.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Marsupial Mole
programme.desc: Nick travels to Australia's Red Centre on the trail of one of the weirdest desert diggers, the Marsupial Mole. To Nick's astonishment he discovers that what is known about this mole is very little.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Slow Loris
programme.desc: Nick travels to the depths of the Bornean jungle to find the only poisonous primate in the world; the Slow Loris. It looks like a cuddly toy, but it carries a poison that can prove fatal.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Horseshoe Crab
programme.desc: The horseshoe crab has been around for nearly half a billion years, making it one of the oldest creatures on the planet. Nick wants to find out what the living fossil has been doing right for so long.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Giant Anteater
programme.desc: Luck is on Nick's side as he goes in search of the awkward middle child of anteaters, the tamandua. Borrowing characteristics from its brothers, the tamandua appears to have an identity crisis.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Pygmy Sloth
programme.desc: Nicks heads to a group of desert islands in Panama where strange things have been happening to the animals. He hangs out with a pygmy sloth and discovers a species of frog with an identity crisis.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Blood Squirting Lizard
programme.desc: Nick heads to cowboy country, southeast Arizona, in search of the horned lizard – a reptile with an amazing trick up its spiny sleeve.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Amazonian Vampire Fish
programme.desc: A blood-sucking vampire lives in the waters of the Amazon, one with a macabre reputation. The candiru is a tiny catfish that has been known to swim up the human urethra.

programme.title: Nick Baker's Weird Creatures: Pink Fairy Armadillo
programme.desc: Nick goes looking for the world's smallest armadillo, it lives in the sandy dunes of Western Argentina, and is very rarely seen even by those who live there.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Venom
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where venomous creatures roam.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Bites
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where creatures with the fiercest of bites roam.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Stealth
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where the kings and queens of stealth lurk.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Tusk and Horns
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where creatures with weapons carved from bone and ivory stalk the open plains.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Taming a 1971 Challenger R/T
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Allysa's Billboard Hit
programme.desc: Allysa and Dougie finish building out the 440 engine for the 1968 GTX currently in assembly. And Allysa and Mark begin one of the most difficult decal applications a White Billboard for the 1970 Cuda' Convertible.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: From Roadrunner to Superbird
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Mopar or No Car
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Reel Life of GYC
programme.desc: Since 2012 Graveyard Carz has become synonymous with high-quality Mopar Restoration. And the show continues to grow with new fans and new builds each and every year. We pull the curtain back to reveal some of the cast and crew's favorite moments.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Parking In-Violetion
programme.desc: In our second to last episode of the season the ghouls shift into high gear to make progress on our In-Violet 1971 'Cuda Convertible. And work begins on our SEMA 2019 build!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Tiny Dancer Strikes Again!
programme.desc: Mark illuminates the ultra-rare option of Mopar sunroofs while the team tackles the task of restoring a real M51 power sunroof 1969 Charger R/T SE sunroof.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: This is Boring
programme.desc: With the shop already filled with restorations Mark takes a road-trip to Boring Oregon to look at a new restoration project. When it turns out to be an unusually well-preserved muscle-car Mark works outside his comfort zone to close the deal.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Mark's Little Demon
programme.desc: The famous 1971 Mr. Norm's Dodge Demon 340 6-pack is cruising through the shop.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: "Yeah it's hopped up to over 160"
programme.desc: The 1970 Challenger Vanishing Point tribute car is back! A major dream project for Mark is the creation of a series of Alpine White 1970 Dodge Challenger R/T tribute cars modeled after the iconic Mopar featured in the film "Vanishing Point".

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Memento Mori
programme.desc: Graveyard Carz has restored its fair share of 1971 'Cudas so what makes this 1971 Hemi Shaker 'Cuda so different? Don't worry we won't ruin the surprise. This is the first time in Graveyard Carz broadcasts that the car will be revealed backwards!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Hellephant in the Room
programme.desc: At SEMA 2018 Mark was gifted the first third-generation 426 Hemi-Crate engine by Mopar and now must decide which car he's going to install it in for SEMA 2019. Meanwhile Will begins paint-prep on a beautiful Rallye Red 1970 Plymouth 'Cuda.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Road Running Home
programme.desc: Good news from Mark's daughter Allyssa! She's pregnant with her fourth child and this time Mark will have a grandson! Unfortunately Mark needs to find a replacement to help with his pet project "The Autopsy Report".

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: One for the Road Movie
programme.desc: The Vanishing Point Challenger has not disappeared from view. After years of gathering rust in the Graveyard this 1970 Alpine White Challenger R/T tribute car has been cleaned up and has received most of its sheet metal.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Ice-Trey 200
programme.desc: To celebrate the 200th episode of Graveyard Carz Mark and the Ghoulz visit a private automotive museum!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Dude, Where's Allysa's Car?
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: More than a Number
programme.desc: Tune in to the season finale of Graveyard Carz and find out what made this season one for the record books! On this special episode Mark and the Ghoulz count and catalog every significant restoration from the very first 1970 Road Runner in season 1

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Firepower Operation
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: A Hunk of Burning Love
programme.desc: What do you get when you cross a bird with a fish? The one and only Phoenix 'Cuda!

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Getting Settled
programme.desc: When they arrive at their new mansion they are mistaken for backwoods servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Meanwhile, Back At The Cabin
programme.desc: The Clampetts find that the comforts of the mansion do not always compare with the comforts of their shack back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Meet Mrs Drysdale
programme.desc: When Mr. Drysdale describes Mrs. Drysdale as being a hypochondriac, the Clampetts assume she must be a drunk.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Buys Stock
programme.desc: When Drysdale suggest buying good stock, Jed quickly buys some cows, pigs and chickens. Meanwhile, Granny has plans to sober up Mrs. Drysdale, who the family believes is a lush.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Trick Or Treat
programme.desc: The Clampetts are feeling homesick so they decide to go visit their new neighbours. Little do they know, it is Halloween, a holiday they have never heard of.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Servants
programme.desc: Drysdale attempts another step insocial renovation of the Clampetts by lending them his servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jethro Goes To School
programme.desc: A private school teacher is shocked to learn that her new fifth grade student is Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly's First Date
programme.desc: Elly May is set up with Sonny Drysdale. When they meet, the date ends very soon, after Sonny tries to kiss Elly’s hand, but she thinks he is trying to bite her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Pygmalion And Elly
programme.desc: Sonny Drysdale plays Pygmalion and Julius Caesar as he resumes his courtship of Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly Races Jethrine
programme.desc: Will Sonny propose to Elly? Can Pearl marry her daughter off? Utter confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Great Feud
programme.desc: Sonny jilts Elly and the Clampetts load their shootin’ irons for a match with the Drysdales.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Home For Christmas
programme.desc: When Granny, Uncle Jed, Elly May and Jethro decide to return to the country for the holidays, they discover airline travel.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Home for Christmas, the Clampetts help Pearl woo Mr. Brewster, a big oil company executive.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Rescues Pearl
programme.desc: Pearl attempts to snag Mr. Brewster until he makes a ridiculous public announcement.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Back To Californy
programme.desc: Jed is confronted with too many cooks when he invites Pearl and Jethrine to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed's Dilemma
programme.desc: Jed takes the family on a sight seeing tour of Beverly Hills to cool a feud between Granny and Pearl.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage
programme.desc: Drysdale’s marriage is threatened when he gets a new housekeeper while his wife is away.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly's Animals
programme.desc: Police and Elly’s animals converge on the Clampett estate when Pearl starts giving yodeling lessons.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Throws A Wing Ding
programme.desc: Two of Pearl’s ardent suitors come to visit her in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Plays Solomon
programme.desc: Granny’s plan to stop Pearl’s yodeling backfires when the police come and find her still.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Duke Steals A Wife
programme.desc: Duke, Jed’s bloodhound, becomes matchmaker for his master and Mlle. Denise, a glamorous Frenchwoman.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Buys The Freeway
programme.desc: A confidence man tries to sell Jed the Hollywood Bowl and a Freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Becomes A Banker
programme.desc: Jed is made a bank vice president so he can compete in an interbank skeet shoot.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Family Tree
programme.desc: An expert on American history finds evidence that Jed’s family preceded the Mayflower to America.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Cuts The Family Tree
programme.desc: Mrs. Smith Standish is spending more time with the Clampetts, desperate to find out if the Clampetts did in fact precede the ‘Mayflower.’

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Granny's Spring Tonic
programme.desc: Granny hands around the Spring Tonic to the family, giving Jed a double dose. At the bank, Gloria transforms herself into a gorgeous secretary, with her sights set on Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Pays His Income Tax
programme.desc: Granny thinks a man from the IRS is a revenuer and chases him off with her gun.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts And The Dodgers
programme.desc: Leo Durocher wants to sign Jethro as a pitcher on the Dodgers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Duke Becomes A Father
programme.desc: Jed falls for a beautiful Beverly Hills matron.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Entertain
programme.desc: Drysdale comes up for a raise when he lands the Clampett account.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts In Court
programme.desc: As the Clampetts are going to the bank, a car bumps into them. When the Johnsons in the car learn how much money the Clampetts have, they decide to sue them.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed
programme.desc: An unlucky psychiatrist somehow winds up with Jethro as a patient.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted
programme.desc: The psychiatrist shows an interest in Granny’s mountain remedies.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Set Course For Heart of the Sun
programme.desc: NASA’S Parker Solar Probe Mission is on its way and will be shortly followed by Europe’s Solar probe Mission.
programme.sub-title: Set Course For Heart of the Sun

programme.title: The New Frontier: Proving Einstein
programme.desc: Some of the proof of Einstein’s theories had long been elusive, beyond the capabilities of technology, until now.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: It powers the machinery of nature; our weather, encourages and sustains life on land and at sea.

programme.title: The New Frontier: From There To Here
programme.desc: Series introduction and the study of Earth from orbit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The Ionisphere, where the Earth interfaces with space, is little understood, it effects radio communications, GPS signals and satellites alike.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Where Are All the Aliens?
programme.desc: We’re looking hard, but the numbers aren’t stacking up, is life on other planets that hard to find? Even signals from an advanced race elude us.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Exo Planeta
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer closer at nearby stars with ever more fidelity they are discovering planets; exo planets, worlds outside our own solar system.

programme.title: Moon Shots: Inside the Lost Apollo Archive
programme.desc: The world famous Apollo missions are some of the greatest feats ever accomplished by man. With rare archive footage and unprecedented access to life on board the Apollo spacecrafts, this stunning one-hour special brings scientific history to life.

programme.title: How to Colonize the Stars
programme.desc: Leading physicists and engineers in the field of interstellar travel discuss some of the deep issues we face when considering the problem of sending spacecraft to other stars. Will mankind ever truly become a space fairing civilization?

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage
programme.desc: Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists give true insider's perspective to the space race of the late 1960's.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Tickets Please
programme.desc: No spacecraft have traveled so fast or so close to a star before. It is hoped to reveal the source of the solar winds that effect us here on Earth

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Astronauts
programme.desc: One hundred kilometres above the Earth’s surface lies an invisible frontier: the edge of space.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Hyabusa
programme.desc: The Japanese Asteroid sample return mission has reached its target and is surveying the space rock ready to dip down and take a sample.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Heavy Lift
programme.desc: New heavy lift rockets are taking to the sky. Falcon Heavy, SLS, Arianne 6 and Vega C rockets are primed to begin the next phase of space expansion.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: With continuous observation of arth from orbit scientists have built a data set over time that reveals much about how the Earth breaths and life sustains itself on this living Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Planet X
programme.desc: The New Horizons mission continues deeper into space, it’s next target looming close.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between us and our Star, the inner worlds; hidden within the sun's glare often only visible at sunrise or sunset.

programme.title: EARTH´S EVIL TWIN
programme.desc: Venus is a planet closest to Earth in distance and size, it once may have been as hospitable to life as Earth is now. Then something changed and Venus became shrouded in hot dense toxic clouds.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Mercury Or Bust
programme.desc: The ESA - JAXA joint Bepi-Colombo Mission is moments away from launch.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Edge of The Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe the further back in time we reach.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.
programme.sub-title: Hidden Havens: Icy Moons / Icy Gems: Frozen Moons

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.
programme.sub-title: Windows to Other Worlds / Fountain of Creation

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Hubble's Canvas: Colour
programme.desc: Every Hubble image begins in black and white, so why are Hubble’s pictures so colourful? The telescope has a wide range of filters that can be assigned different colours.

programme.title: Hubble's Canvas: Cosmic Perspective
programme.desc: Our ancestors thought the sky was flat, but we now know it as a place of infinite depth.

programme.title: Hubble's Canvas: Grand Design
programme.desc: The forces of nature, operating at large and small scales create a universe of symmetry and form.

programme.title: Hubble's Canvas: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: There are monsters loose in the cosmos, giant black holes that devour matter and spit out high-speed jets of atoms.

programme.title: The Battle of Midway: Dauntless
programme.desc: A U.S. carrier group is positioned off the coast of Midway in June 1942. During the battle, the two-man crew of a U.S. Navy dive bomber is forced to ditch in the sea. Amid the vast openness of the Pacific, the men are forced to face their own mortality.

programme.title: The Librarian: Quest for the Spear
programme.desc: As a means of finding the legendary book known as the Key of Solomon, Flynn pairs with a brainy archaeologist to first acquire the map legend. Unfortunately, they must elude the sinister General Samir and the ulterior plans of Flynn's uncle.

programme.title: Dragon Warriors
programme.desc: An evil wizard, Lord Tensley, seeks the hand and heart of the beautiful princess. When she refuses, he locks her away and releases a deadly dragon to terrorize the land. Starring: James Marsters, Kaitlin Doubleday, Luke Perry

programme.title: 2012: Ice Age
programme.desc: When a volcanic eruption in Iceland sends a glacier hurtling toward North America, a family struggles to escape the onslaught of the coming ice age.

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: From director of action blockbuster Lethal Weapon, Richard Donner. Personal demons put cop Jack (Bruce Willis - Die Hard) at rock bottom but he wasn’t about to let a witness be murdered on his watch.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan (Taylor Lautner) discovers the parents who raised him aren't his real folks, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets that trigger events and leave him running for his life.

programme.title: Blood Out
programme.desc: In the vein of TRAINING DAY, STREET KINGS, and AMERICAN GANGSTER - Curtis 50 CENT Jackson, Val Kilmer, and Vinnie Jones star in a new action packed film filled with good cop/bad cop vengeance!

programme.title: Spiritual Kung Fu
programme.desc: Action a-plenty as Jackie Chan seeks a mystical manual stolen from his temple. In the wrong hands this knowledge could spell disaster so it’s up to Jackie to track it down and counter the deadly fight moves that the book has endowed upon the thief.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad and The Dead
programme.desc: A man wakes up in the desert wounded, with no memory and four million in cash. Pursued by a notorious drug lord (Danny Trejo), a DEA Agent (Dolph Lundgren), and a corrupt Sheriff (Michael Pare) who will stop at nothing to get his hand on the fortune.

programme.title: We Die Young
programme.desc: Sudden Death meets Sicario in this gritty thriller starring action legend Jean Claud Van Damme. When a ruthless drug lord recruits a 10-year-old boy, his older brother is desperate to keep him safe and flees for their lives.

programme.title: Hatchet Hour
programme.desc: An ambitious lawyer kills her gardener by mistake, fearing her chances with the law and the impact this will have on her career at a prestigious firm, she turns to her best friend to help her get rid of the body.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: The personal ads of New York's trendiest magazines become the hunting ground for a bizarre killer whose calling card is a single, high heeled dancing shoe and one woman is determined to find out his true identity after the murder of her friend.
programme.sub-title: Mary Higgins Clark: Loves Music, Love To Dance

programme.title: Vows of Deception
programme.desc: When a prominent lawyer is found murdered, his wife is promptly arrested and charged with the crime. She swiftly accuses her stepson, with whom she claims to be having an affair.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Lisa's return to her hometown to join the local police force coincides with the release of a man, Jake, who killed her best friend 15 years earlier. Soon, people start dying mysterious deaths and the investigation points to Jake as prime suspect.
programme.sub-title: Mary Higgins Clark: Try To Remember

programme.title: French Silk
programme.desc: In steamy New Orleans, a police detective doesn't know whether to arrest his prime suspect or make love to her after he unexpectedly finds himself in a passionate affair with an accused killer.

programme.title: My Son Is Innocent
programme.desc: After a brutal nighttime rape, police investigators zero in on teenager Eric Sutter. When the victim identifies Eric as her attacker, the legal system closes in on the boy as friends, neighbors and the media turn against him.

programme.title: A Teacher's Crime
programme.desc: Carrie is an attractive and ambitious high-school teacher, who gets close to one of her students, Jeremy. Jeremy is a good kid, but he lives with his ex-con uncle Bill. When Bill finds out about their friendship, he blackmails her.

programme.title: Secrets of an Undercover Wife
programme.desc: A newlywed goes undercover to investigate after her husband is unexpectedly arrested and convicted of murder and embezzlement.

programme.title: Seduced By A Thief
programme.desc: When a security guard is blamed for the theft of a necklace, he tracks down the beautiful thief, only to be seduced into a world of diamond smuggling and double-cross.

programme.title: The Perfect Teacher
programme.desc: Starring Megan Park, David Charvet, and Boti Bliss. When spoiled, beautiful high-schooler Devon sets her sights on her handsome teacher, she won't take no for an answer - even it means putting getting his girlfriend involved.

programme.title: The Four Warriors
programme.desc: Travelling home, four soldiers discover a village gripped by fear, as residents are abducted by unknown predators. These warriors set out to rescue them and destroy what lurks outside the village.

programme.title: Solar Attack
programme.desc: When the sun's increasing expulsions of plasma threaten to ignite methane in our atmosphere, international tensions rise while scientists race for a solution to avoid natural disaster.

programme.title: The Last Boy
programme.desc: The world at an end, a dying mother sends her young son on a journey to the place that grants wishes. A fantasy drama inspired by the works of the 13th Century Sufi Mystic and Poet Rumi.

programme.title: Atlas Shrugged: Who Is John Galt?
programme.desc: Approaching collapse, the nation's economy is quickly eroding. As crime and fear take over the countryside, the government continues to exert its brutal force against the nation's most productive who are mysteriously vanishing.

programme.title: The Starving Games
programme.desc: Good morning hungry citizens of District 12! Don’t forget today is the Gathering Ceremony, so parents please do bring your beloved children to the square for a random death lottery. When lithe and fearless Kantmiss volunteers to take part.

programme.title: Cadia: The World Within
programme.desc: Devastated by the loss of their mother, three teens discover a mystical realm ruled by unseen forces and must overcome evil in the order to return home.

programme.title: Terra Formars
programme.desc: In an attempt to colonise Mars, 21st-century scientists seed the planet with algae to absorb sunlight and purify the atmosphere...

programme.title: Marjorie Prime
programme.desc: In 2050, 86-year-old Marjorie has a holographic companion who resembles her dead husband and is programmed to feed her the story of her life. With Lois Smith, Jon Hamm, Geena Davis.

programme.title: Target Earth
programme.desc: When aliens have infiltrated society by inhabiting bodies of select human beings, they plan a full-scale invasion of Earth. A detective finds the information that can stop the attack; however the information is in the mind of a six-year-old child.

programme.title: Alien Code: Alien Code
programme.desc: After deciphering a message found in a satellite, brilliant cryptographer Alex Jacobs finds himself being stalked by government agents and otherworldly beings.

programme.title: Hostages of the SS: On a Razor's Edge
programme.desc: In Niederdorf the hostages turn the tables on their kidnappers.

programme.title: Signs of Evil - The Runes of the SS
programme.desc: The symbol of the SS stands for terror and the murder of millions. Documentary about the history of a symbol that represents murder.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Madness of Rudolf Hess
programme.desc: Hitler’s Deputy stakes his reputation on one last desperate gamble.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Rise and Fall of Reinhard Heydrich
programme.desc: The rise of Reinhard Heydrich: a story of mass murder.
programme.sub-title: The Rise and Fall of Reinhard Heydrich

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Rise of the Sycophants
programme.desc: Albert Speer: Favouritism, Envy and Betrayal in Hitler’s inner circle.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: Beginning of the End
programme.desc: Germany is losing the war, Hitler’s inner circle plot against the regime.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: Meltdown
programme.desc: The day of reckoning has arrived. The Nazi inner circle plots their escape.

programme.title: Hitler's People: Conformity
programme.desc: Nazi Germany 10 years before the 1944 assassination attempt: it’s the era just after the seizure of power, when enforced conformity becomes part of all aspects of life.

programme.title: Hitler's People: Total War
programme.desc: By the time of the Allied landings in Normandy, everything has changed: it marks the beginning of the end for Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Hitler's Mega Plane
programme.desc: In January 2012, Italian divers discovered the wreck of a massive plane off the coast of Sardinia. At a depth of 65 meters (213 feet) lies a Messerschmidt “Gigant”.

programme.title: Project Nazi: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler’s mastery of propaganda, and his instinctive skill for effective design, helps win huge popular support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler promises to make Germany great again with his ambitious plans to create 22,000 kms of motorway and build one and half million “People’s Cars” every year.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany’s military strength after its humiliating defeat in the First World War by stealing raw materials from abroad.

programme.title: Project Nazi: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes control of all forms of media to spread Nazi propaganda.

programme.title: Project Nazi: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler’s bid for power depends on his most loyal and violent supporters, the SS. They use intimidation, detention, terror and even murder to defeat all the Nazis political enemies.

programme.title: Project Nazi: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Hitler uses technology and terror to keep Germans fighting to the bitter end.

programme.title: The Spying Game: Tales of the Cold War
programme.desc: During the Cold War, Germany becomes the battleground for countless spies.

programme.desc: The Falkland's bleak, battered, and windswept archipelago lies 460 km from the South American mainland. Rugged mountains and expansive pristine coastline are a unique home for wildlife  especially for one of the world's most iconic flightless birds.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Zanzibar: Land of Giants
programme.desc: The Zanzibar Archipelago has been labeled the most exotic island chain in the world. Pristine sands and azure blue sea make it a much loved holiday destination. /The Caribbean is a tropical paradise. Each of the 7,000 islands are unique.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Islands can be home to the most extreme examples of life, the wildest of people and the most dramatic landscapes. Natural selection fuels evolution in the most dramatic way

programme.title: Wildest Islands: The Hebrides: Land of Legends
programme.desc: Just off the coast of west Scotland, the Hebrides archipelago is made up of more than 500 islands and islets. A perfect breeding ground for millions of creatures. /Japan's 7,000 islands stretch for over 2,400 km, and cover an incredible range of climates.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Philippines: Islands of Mystery
programme.desc: The Philippines are a chain of around 7,000 tropical islands in the western Pacific.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Caribbean: The Wild Side of Paradise
programme.desc: The Caribbean is a tropical paradise. From just a few meters wide, to hundreds of kilometers across, each of the over 7,000 islands are different, and each has its own unique wildlife.
programme.sub-title: Caribbean: The Wild Side of Paradise

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Sri Lanka: Monsoon Island
programme.desc: Lying like a teardrop in the Indian Ocean, Sri Lanka is an island that defies convention. Poised just six degrees above the equator, it's less than 75,000 km sq in size. But it has enough wildlife to rival a continent.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Amazon River Islands: The Floating Forest

programme.sub-title: Amazon River Islands: The Floating Forest

programme.title: MasterChef Australia: Episode 6
programme.desc: It’s their very first Invention Test and they’ll do whatever it takes to avoid the bottom three and the Pressure Test that will follow the next day.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 13
programme.desc: They’ve enjoyed cooking in their own homes but tonight they will have to cook in other people’s homes for an entire street of people for their annual street party.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 14
programme.desc: In tonight’s test, all teams must compete to create the ultimate meat and three veg meal.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 15

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 16
programme.desc: Tonight the MY KITCHEN RULES teams must cook breakfast on the go for the cast and crew of Home and Away.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 17
programme.desc: Those who failed to impress the stars of Home and Away go head-to-head in a cook-off, but just before they start, the judges announce a twist.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 18
programme.desc: The two teams at the bottom of the scoreboard use all their skill and creativity in an effort to serve up a meal impressive enough to keep them in the competition.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 19
programme.desc: The teams of amateur cooks whip up treats designed to please a group of pernickety children, but the young diners don't hold back with their opinions.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 20
programme.desc: The teams cook against the clock in a demanding 30 minute challenge; the foodies use every trick in the book to impress.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 21
programme.desc: The two teams at the bottom of the cooking scoreboard go head to head. What will they concoct in their battle to stay in the competition?

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 22

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Bonapartes
programme.desc: When chef Tim sold "fine dining" to the owner of Bonapartes, she assumed he could cook. Ramsay discovers Tim's true skills. Contains strong language.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: The Glass House
programme.desc: At the Glass House, Ramsay finds the restaurant owner close to tears as yet another Saturday night goes down the drain. Contains strong language.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: The Walnut Tree
programme.desc: Ramsay’s has his work cut out to restore the reputation of the Walnut Tree Inn, which is now chef-less and broke. Contains strong language.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: Moore Place
programme.desc: Moore Place in Esher looks more like a rest home than a restaurant, so it’s no wonder the dining room is empty. Contains strong language.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: The Glass House Revisited
programme.desc: Gordon returns to the Glass House to see how the restaurant fares after last season's turnaround. Contains strong language.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares: The Walnut Tree Revisited
programme.desc: Gordon returns to the Walnut Tree Inn to see how the restaurant fares after last season's turnaround. Contains strong language.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares
programme.desc: Gordon returns to Moore Place in Esher to see how the restaurant fares after last season's turnaround. Contains strong language.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Aim
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own fingerprint, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written In Blood
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Chemistry
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Vanished
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Double Helix
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Price of Murder
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Drawing Conclusions
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Abduction
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear, kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fateful Twist
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scattered Clues
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutalchoosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Left At The Scene
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Remnant of Blame
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In The Camera's Eye
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Collective Justice
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives: True Crime
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Signed In Blood
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The two finalists are taken to LA Market where the winner will work, and told to cook five dishes for a taste test.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The signature dish challenge kicks of Gordon Ramsay's US cooking competition, with the most successful team getting to enjoy a lunch at the LA Market restaurant.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: With a trip to Palm Springs in a private jet up for grabs, the contestants compete by cooking four pieces of meat to Chef Ramsay's instructions.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A trip to a medieval-themed restaurant is up for grabs for the team who complete a special meal for 50 children and their mothers.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.desc: A body identification goes awry when it turns out Beka's former crewmate isn't dead at all.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dance of the Mayflies
programme.desc: Andromeda rescues dying people from a drift, but they soon turn into zombies being controlled by a hive-mind.

programme.title: Andromeda: In Heaven Now Are Three
programme.desc: The engine of creation is capable of rewriting the universe according to the owner's wishes. Dylan, Beka and Trance must obtain it before someone with dark plans gets it.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Things We Cannot Change
programme.desc: A black hole knocks out Dylan and sends him into an alternative reality with a wife and child.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Fair Unknown

programme.title: Andromeda: Belly of the Beast
programme.desc: A mythological space monster tries to eat the Andromeda.

programme.title: Andromeda: Immaculate Perception
programme.desc: Genites attack Tyr's wife and colony.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: With fifty parties on board, Dylan hosts the signing of the New Commonwealth charter, but soon discovers there are intruders intent on stopping the signing.
programme.sub-title: Tunnel at the End of the Light

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka and Tyr are taken over by the energy from a dimensional tunnel. Dylan, Trance and Harper must save them before they destroy the ship.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Shards of Rimni
programme.desc: Dylan is framed for murder and must clear his name while finding the pieces of a vase said to grant the owner the "blessings of the cosmos."

programme.title: Andromeda: Mad to Be Saved
programme.desc: The crew rescues a group of refugees, only to discover they have been subject to government experiments and are extremely unstable.

programme.title: Andromeda: Cui Bono

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew discovers that a rogue planet, Marduk, has been creating weapons of mass destruction.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Leper's Kiss
programme.desc: A hitman by the name of the Leper is targeting the leaders of the New Commonwealth.

programme.title: Andromeda: For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: The Andromeda is haunted by a mysterious creature that comes aboard during a solar storm.

programme.title: Andromeda: And Your Heart Will Fly Away
programme.desc: When a long lost love returns, Tyr disappears from the ship to protect her from an assassin.
programme.sub-title: And Your Heart Will Fly Away

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Psychics Revealed - Special
programme.desc: Behind the scenes with the psychics on the show.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Seeking Siegfried
programme.desc: Katikati man Siegfried Newman disappeared on February 25, 2008, after he had dropped his sons Thomas, 9, and Oliver, 7, at Pahoia School. Police carried out a three-day search but found no sign of him.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Mother's Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Otautau toddler Amber-Lee, aged two and a half, vanished from Kingston at the southern tip of Lake Wakatipu on October 17, 1992.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Last Orders
programme.desc: In 1993, devoted father Kevin O'Loughlin came face to face with the dark side of sunny Nelson when he was brutally stabbed to death after a night out on the town.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Girl in The Ditch
programme.desc: When 12 year old Agnes Ali'iva'a drowned in a ditch in 1992, the police initially thought her death was accidental. It was four years before public and political pressure forced police to re-investigate her death.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: In 1957, nine-year-old Peter Boland was on holiday having the time of his life on a remote farm in New Zealand when he simply vanished without a trace. Peter’s older brother Gavin Boland, a self-confessed sceptic, turns to Sensing Murder’s psychics.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: In Too Deep
programme.desc: In 1999, Kiwi engineer Aaron Hopa and his English colleague Robert Glazzard were murdered on board a survey ship in the Persian Gulf in.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken Out
programme.desc: Was Donovan Reidy deliberately run down and left to die? In 1995, 23-year-old Donovan Reidy was at a party when he got into a fight. A short while later, his bloodied body was found on the side of a major New Zealand highway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: In 2003, 32-year-old mother of three Sara Neithe vanished from the Hauraki Plains. Neither Sara nor her car have been seen since. Police suspect that Sara has been murdered but without a crime scene, they have been unable to advance the case.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces
programme.desc: Garth Doull trained to be a policeman but the lure of the race track saw him swap sides of the law to become a consummate con-man. On the 8th of September 1989, his body was found floating in Wellington harbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Long Way Home
programme.desc: 25-year-old Te Puke woman Judy Yorke was a devoted single mum who adored her kids. When she missed her daughter’s fourth birthday party, her family knew something was terribly wrong and reported her missing.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where's Grandad?
programme.desc: 65-year-old Alan Gordon Woodford of Bedford St. Mossburn left his home on foot Saturday morning April 20, 1985 and was never seen or heard of again.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Stone Cold
programme.desc: In 2004, Brendan Percy was found dead of hypothermia and dehydration in a sub alpine area above Oamaru in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of 53-year-old, Cynthia Greenwood-Smith, to unravel the lies and discover the grim truth surrounding her disappearance from her Gold Coast home in 2001.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Sensing Murder Insights - Special
programme.desc: Police detectives from around New Zealand reveal exciting new developments sparked by the Sensing Murder psychics in Series 1.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Ivan Milat: The Backpacker Murders
programme.desc: The backpacker murder case in the Belanglo State Forest, south west of Sydney, has entered Australian criminal folklore.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Murder of Innocence: Sian Kingi
programme.desc: On 27 November 1987, 12-year-old Noosa school girl Sian Kingi was grabbed off her push bike by Valmae Fay Beck and Barrie John Watts as she rode home from school.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Evil Heart: The Murder of Donna Wheeler
programme.desc: The bloodied, semi-naked body of 30-year-old Donna Wheeler is discovered by her estranged husband Keith Bond and 12-year-old son.
programme.sub-title: Evil Heart: The Murder of Donna Wheeler

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Buried Alive: Luckman and Reid
programme.desc: On the night of 4 May 1982, 13-year-old Terry Ryan rushed into his family home in Marsden, a suburb of Brisbane, and told his mother an astonishing story.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Night of Terror: The Bega Schoolgirls
programme.desc: On the 6th October 1997, 14-year-old Lauren Barry and 16-year-old Nicole Collins disappeared while walking along a road near their home town of Bega, on the New South Wales south coast.
programme.sub-title: Night of Terror: The Bega Schoolgirls

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Night Caller: Eric Edgar Cooke
programme.desc: In 1959, the carefree culture of Perth changed forever when a plague of crime hit the city. By early 1963, the crime wave had escalated to serial murder.
programme.sub-title: The Night Caller: Eric Edgar Cooke

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Michael Kanaan: Shoot to Kill
programme.desc: Michael Kanaan was an angry young man in a hurry to make a name for himself in Sydney’s underworld. But his volatile temper and penchant for violence soon led him to kill three men before he was finally captured in a wild shootout with Sydney police.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: A Killer Amongst Us: The Norfolk Island Murder
programme.desc: On Easter Sunday 2002, on sleepy Norfolk Island in the south west Pacific, the body of 29-year-old Janelle Patton was found lying in an open field.
programme.sub-title: A Killer Amongst Us: The Norfolk Island Murder

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Mystery of the Homestead Murders
programme.desc: The quick mind of a country telephone exchange supervisor led to a horrific discovery at a NSW country homestead in 1978.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Predator: Leonard John Fraser
programme.desc: Serial killer Leonard Fraser was suspected of killing at least five women over a 17 year period but took the complete truth about his life of crime to his grave.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Butchered Boys
programme.desc: This episode revisits Adelaide's notorious Adelaide Family Murders case, where six young Adelaide men were murdered during the 1970s and '80s. The victims were found in random locations throughout the state, their bodies neatly cut into pieces.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Blood Sport: The Bondi Gay Murders
programme.desc: In the late 1980s and early 1990s a series of violent murders took place near Sydney’s famous Bondi Beach.
programme.sub-title: Blood Sport: The Bondi Gay Murders

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Thrill Kill: The Janine Balding Murder
programme.desc: On a September night in 1986, two police officers climbed through a barbed-wire fence beside the F4 freeway at Minchinbury in Sydney’s west.
programme.sub-title: Thrill Kill: The Janine Balding Murder

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Cop Killer: The Winchester Assassination
programme.desc: The highest ranking police officer in Australia to be murdered, Assistant Federal Police Commissioner Colin Winchester was shot twice in the head at point blank range as he was getting out of his car outside his Deakin home on 10 January 1989.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Date With a Serial Killer: Rodney Cameron
programme.desc: Rodney Francis Cameron was dubbed ‘The Lonely Hearts Killer’ after he used a radio match-making program in 1990 to lure an unsuspecting woman to her death. Incredibly, he had only just been released from prison for two other killings in 1974.
programme.sub-title: Date With a Serial Killer: Rodney Cameron

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: No Mercy: The Killing of Virginia Morse
programme.desc: The horrific story of killers Allan Baker and Kevin Crump who began their murderous spree in rural NSW by killing a complete stranger for $20, a packet of cigarettes and a couple of litres of petrol.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Moorhouse Horrors / The Call Girl Killing
