programme.title: Mob Wives: Cuts Both Ways
programme.desc: The war between Karen and Drita reaches irreparable heights when Brittany relays an explosive rumor. The women work to cheer Ang up as she faces yet another life threatening surgery.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Drittany
programme.desc: Karen works to squash the feud between Brittany, Carla and Renee but accidentally creates more bad blood. Renee's dance instructor issues a surprising challenge. Big Ang's future hangs in the balance as she waits to find out if her cancer has spread.

programme.title: Mob Wives: What's Done is Done
programme.desc: Karen tries to step out of the drama and back into her relationship with her daughter. Renee performs in her final ballroom dancing class. Drita continues to steam after hearing Karen's verbal attack and calls for a final sitdown with Karen and Marissa.

programme.title: Mob Wives: The Final Sitdown
programme.desc: Never-before-seen footage from the show's tumultuous history will be shown to the women for the very first time as they get ready for a final sitdown.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Episode 1
programme.desc: Karen is welcomed back to Staten Island after 10 long years of exile in Arizona, though loyal mafia daughter Renee is outraged by her presence at Carla's birthday party.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Episode 2
programme.desc: Carla wants peace between her friends after the big fight, Renee vents to her therapist about her ex-husband's unreliability, and Drita is sick of waiting for Lee to come home for good.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Episode 3
programme.desc: Drita worries about her daughters, Karen revisits her past as she begins work on her book, and Renee finds comfort with an unlikely source when Junior is swept up in a mass mob bust.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Episode 4
programme.desc: Carla struggles with single motherhood, Renee hosts a psychic party and decides to bury the hatchet with Drita, and a confrontation at a bar threatens Junior's temporary freedom

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The Murder of Imette St Guillen explores the hours and events leading up to her horrific death and the large-scale police investigation that identified her killer.
programme.sub-title: The Murder of Imette St Guillen

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In February 2012, a man got into a pick-up truck at a mall close to his home and was never seen alive again. Nine months later, after a huge search was launched, police discovered his human remains.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: December 2000: 19-year-old Rachel Manning was murdered in Milton Keynes. Two men were wrongfully convicted, but new advances in forensics proved that evil always leaves a trace.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When the body of a child is found, Boston State Police have no leads, but with the help of the National Centre for Missing and Exploited Children, a trace is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Edinburgh, October 1977: Christine Eadie and Helen Scott vanish without a trace. The police never stopped hunting for justice, even changing the law to bring justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Tracie Andrews purportedly witnessed the murder of her boyfriend, Lee Harvey, in a country lane on the night of 1st December 1996; but all was not what it seemed.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In late 1992, an attack led to an investigation which would last nearly a quarter of a century. Over time, DNA profiling helped to close a case which detectives feared would never be solved.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: David Jackson left his home to buy beer and cigarettes. He was never seen again. For 15 years his disappearance remained unsolved, until one investigator broke the case wide open.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Kelsey Berreth vanishes on Thanksgiving in 2018, blood in her house and cell phone records indicate that there is more to Kelsey's disappearance than meets the eye.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation into a body found in a plastic container and how the killer is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The terrifying assault of Ronda Guzman and the investigation that reveals her attacker after 33 years.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the 35-year investigation and forensic advances that identify Rosa's savage killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation that reveals the predator responsible for numerous sexual assaults.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 22nd December 1979, Phyllis Murphy disappears after doing some Christmas shopping. When she doesn't come home, her family fear the worst, but it's not until a month later in the Wicklow Mountains that her body is discovered.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 31st July 2003, a woman was reported missing after she hadn't been seen or heard from in over a week. Police suspected foul play and after an intensified search, they tracked down her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 28th February 2001, the body of a woman was found at the bottom of the stairs of her home in North Dublin, Ireland. What initially looked like an accident, soon turned into a murder investigation.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In March 2007, Shamaia Smith failed to return from work in East Hartford, Connecticut. After a few days she was reported missing. An investigation was launched but it became clear she was probably dead.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In January 1992, when an estate agent went missing, both police and her family feared the worst. For 25-year-old Stephanie Slater, it was the start of an 8 day ordeal defined by torture and terror.

programme.title: NOW 70's
programme.desc: NOW 70s is your 24/7 seventies party channel. From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco, the team at NOW That’s What I Call Music brings you a channel devoted to the hits of the decade, including classics from ABBA, Elton John, Marvin Gaye, & many more.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Scott Tenorman Must Die: Cartman is tricked into buying pubic hair by Scott Tenorman. Outraged at being laughed at, he plots the most sickest, evil revenge possible... Radiohead guest star. (S5, E04)

programme.title: South Park: It Hits the Fan
programme.desc: It Hits The Fan: Swearing on a TV show leads to mass profanity in South Park. What does this have to do with The Black Death?! The you-know-what-hits the fan 162 times in this ep! (S5, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Cr***le Fight
programme.desc: Cr***le Fight: It's Timmy vs. Jimmy! But does Jimmy know this? The boys are joining the Scouts (troop 69) but their parents aren't so sure when they discover who the Scout Leader is. (S5, E02)

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip - Behind The Blow: The boys face death at the hands of some unhinged environmentalists unless they can re-unite Terrance and Phillip for a show at Earth Day Festival! (S5, E05)
programme.sub-title: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow

programme.title: South Park: Cartmanland
programme.desc: Cartmanland: When Cartman inherits $1million and purchases his own theme park, Stan starts to question his faith in God. It's not long before things start to go out of control for Cartman. (S5, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Proper Condom Use
programme.desc: Proper Condom Use: After Cartman and Stan play "red rocket" with their dogs, their parents decide it's time for some school sex education. What the school provides creates worse problems! (S5, E07)

programme.title: South Park: Towelie
programme.desc: Towelie: Stan's mother buys the boys a console called The Okama Gamesphere but it is stolen whilst they are at school. To get it back they must help a talking towel take on the government! (S5, E08)

programme.title: South Park: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants
programme.desc: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants: The boys send $1 to Afghan children and receive a goat back. When they try to return it an adventure ensues! First episode to air after 9/11. (S5, E09)
programme.sub-title: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants

programme.title: South Park: How To Eat With Your Butt
programme.desc: How To Eat With Your Butt: It's school photo time. Kenny decides to play a prank by wearing his parka upside down and revealing his buttocks. Cartman decides to take it a step further. (S5, E10)
programme.sub-title: How To Eat With Your Butt

programme.title: South Park: The Entity
programme.desc: The Entity: Kyle's annoying cousin arrives in town and it's not long before the boys are doing their best to get rid of him. Mr Garrison invents a slightly sexual new mode of transport. (S5, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Here Comes The Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Here Comes The Neighbourhood: Token is picked on for being rich so decides to market the town as a millionaire's playground - cue Will Smith and Snoop Dogg moving in! Class war follows! (S5, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Kenny Dies
programme.desc: Kenny Dies: When Kenny is diagnosed with a terminal illness, Stan takes it especially hard. Will Cartman's truck load of foetuses help with a cure? Or does he have other plans for them... (S5, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Butter's Very Own Episode
programme.desc: Butters' Very Own Episode: Butters' mum asks him to spy on his dad, however what he discovers leaves Mrs Stoch acting slightly unhinged. Will this be the end of our lil blonde haired buddy? (S5, E14)

programme.title: South Park: Professor Chaos (Part 1)
programme.desc: Professor Chaos (1): Butters is sacked by the boys as their replacement best friend for Kenny - the hunt for a new friend is on! Out for revenge, Butters becomes... Professor Chaos! (S6, E06)

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More mechanical mayhem as teams of roboteers do battle to become king of the scrap heap. Let the trials begin!

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The small but mighty Storm II takes on Mayhem, Rhino and Supernova in round one, as Mayhem fights its first battle. Team Steel Avenger named the heat, the Heat of Doom as it includes Supernova, Shredder Evolution and Storm II.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Thermidor 2 and Kronic the Wedgehog meet again in a replay of another heat. Thermidor 2 puts up an impressive fight as it takes down every robot in its path.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Heat number 11 of the series sees controversy as T-Wrecks makes a bold move that breaks the rule about having an active weapon. Round one pits Mantis, Infernal Contraption, Bulldog Breed and Jabber against one another.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight robots enter the arena, including old crowd favourite, Behemoth. Heat L also features a grudge match to settle the score between Behemoth and Crushtacean.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Champion robot Panic Attack returns in the thirteenth heat of the series. A series 5 round is replicated as the Four Horsemen and Team Panic Attack are once again pitted against each another.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: In the 14th heat of the seventh series, round one sees Spawn Again, Chip and NEATer Machine do battle with Revenge of Trouble & Strife. The next round pits Topbot against R.O.C.S and Raging Nightmare.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: As the semifinals draw near, Bigger Brother makes its mark in the arena, as it takes on Colossus and Typhoon 2 in round one. Round two sees DisConstructor tackle Xenomorph, Hammerhead 2 and Iron-Awe 2.1.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Firestorm makes a long-awaited comeback in a battle against Daisy-Cutter, Black and Blue, and Bamm Bamm. Heat P determines the robots who will make it to the semi-finals of the seventh series.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight competitors compete for a spot in the next semi-final round as half are eliminated. Round 1 sees Tornado employ the use of a spinner drum to flip its opponent.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The four victors from the round 1 semifinal compete for a place in the grand final. Round 1 sees Firestorm 5 go head-to-head with Mute, in a flipping assault.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: In the eliminating rounds, Tornado takes on Storm 2, and X-Terminator challenges Typhoon 2, in a fierce attack that takes out the disc weapon of Typhoon 2.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six robots fight until one is taken down. The remaining fighters regroup and continue until only one remains. Round one begins in a merciless fashion as Ripper flips Robochicken.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Challengers from more than five main competitions battle for supremacy. In a David versus Goliath battle, Dantomkia takes on the might of Behemoth in an attempt to throw it out of the arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight teams made up of families and friends from across the country put their homemade robots to the test inside a purpose-built arena, packed with arena hazards and four House Robots. The winner at the end will go forward to the grand-final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, the Hypno-Disc competitor became an instant icon.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. The Razer Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Past
programme.desc: As Deborah Utley begins experiencing paranormal events in her home, she turns to her faith for protection. But when her children are targeted by the entity she seeks the aid of paranormal investigators to end the cycle of terror.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare In Bridgeport
programme.desc: Connecticut child safety specialist Bob Baker has devoted his life to protecting children from natural and supernatural harm. When his mother starts hearing voices in his childhood home, Bob is faced with a demon that evolves from his own nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Diabolical
programme.desc: A session with a Ouija board transforms Marie’s home into a portal for the diabolical.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ashes To Evil
programme.desc: Soon after moving in a large apartment in Hampton, Tennessee, Amelia’s family can’t shake the feeling that they are not alone. An evil entity lurks in their dream home and is targeting family members. They turn to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Rises
programme.desc: After a major surgery forces Jacinda Rearick to recuperate at home, she discovers orbs in family photos. At first, Jacinda believes that they are her deceased parents watching over her. But something much more sinister is invading her home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Where Evil Lurks
programme.desc: Soon after the Shea family moves into their new home, eerie noises and ghostly voices begin.

programme.title: A Haunting: Mother's Terror
programme.desc: When Jeanette's firefighter husband dies in the line of duty, she moves her daughters to a rustic hamlet in Long Island to start anew. Shortly after moving in, an evil entity lashes out at her daughter, Jeanette refuses to quit without a fight.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dark Wrath
programme.desc: Unsettling nightmares of a dark angry figure plague Cindy as she prepares to move her family.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: Carl, Keith and Cynthia Johnson begin using a spirit board, to communicate with the spirit haunting their home. But when their sister, Cynthia, is attacked both boys realize they are in over their heads and reach out to a paranormal investigator for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: Vision Of Terror
programme.desc: When Stacy Stowe hears ghostly sounds in her home, she assumes it's the spirit of her late husband who died in a tragic car accident. But a psychic warns Stacy that she will find no peace until she closes the portal that has opened the door for evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Untouchable
programme.desc: After her mother, Linda, returns from a routine overseas trip to India, Kara Dravis begins experiencing unexplained and terrifying events in their home. Linda and Kara turn to a clairvoyant in hopes she can find a resolution to the haunting.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghosts Of War
programme.desc: When Dennis Pongratz finds his deceased father's Army belongings, he unlocks a treasure trove of WWII memorabilia, including an armband removed from a Nazi soldier killed in battle. Soon the Pongratz home becomes a battleground between good and evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Blood Visions
programme.desc: Faced with a supernatural threat, Betty Johnson and her family move hoping to leave their troubles behind. But when Betty’s oldest child starts experiencing bloody visions and is physically attacked, the family realizes "it" has followed them.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Lake Club Horror
programme.desc: The Lake Club is transformed into a rock n roll nightclub with mysterious happenings.

programme.title: A Haunting: Where Demons Dwell
programme.desc: Young David suffers from intense nightmares and is physically attacked by an invisible entity.

programme.title: A Haunting: Games of Lies
programme.desc: In 2012, Olivia and Jesse Barbour move into their dream home with five-year-old daughter Marie. Soon after, Marie makes her first friend in the neighborhood, a boy named Jackson. Olivia is thrilled until she realizes Jackson is really an imaginary friend.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hell House
programme.desc: Bonnie and her family buy a farmhouse and they sense that they are being watched.

programme.title: A Haunting: Back From The Grave
programme.desc: Stay-at-home-mom Jamie enjoys taking walks with her children through her historic North Carolina neighborhood, until "something" dark and sinister follows them home. Jamie soon finds her son directly communicating with an entity from "beyond the grave."

programme.title: Eggheads
programme.desc: The general knowledge quiz show in which four contestants take on the formidable Eggheads, a team of the brainiest quizzers in the UK. Can anyone beat the ultimate champions?

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: In 1981, a mother vanishes from the Hernando woods and the case goes cold. Thirty-three years later, local detectives reopen the investigation, only to discover that getting a confession may be the only way to solve the case.

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos
programme.desc: Former Detective Superintendent David Swindle and psychologist Emma Kenny give us an insight into Jamie Reynolds' twisted mind and reveal the full extent of his morbid fascination with extreme violence against women.
programme.sub-title: Our Daughter Murdered In Snuff Movie Fantasy: Georgia Williams

programme.desc: Rana Faruqui's former boyfriend Stephen Griffiths refused to accept that their relationship, which had only lasted a few months, was over and that Rana wanted nothing more to do with him.

programme.title: Bedlam
programme.desc: Anxiety has become the mental illness of our time. The NHS issues around seven million tranquiliser prescriptions every year. At the Bethlem Royal Psychiatric Hospital, a specialist anxiety unit treats some of the most extreme cases in Britain.

programme.title: Bedlam
programme.desc: Lambeth Hospital in South London has pioneered the use of short-stay emergency wards for patients in crisis. Father-of-four Dominic is a creative director of an IT company. He's been admitted to the ward following a suicide attempt.

programme.title: Educating Essex
programme.desc: As leaver's day, exams and the all-important prom approach, the school tries to prepare two very different students for the future. Fifteen-year-old Ryan, a recent arrival at the school, has Asperger's, while student Vinni cannot wait to leave.

programme.title: Educating Essex
programme.desc: Follow deputy head Mr Drew as he attends to all the discipline needs of the school.

programme.title: Medium: Head Games
programme.desc: Allison is involved in a murder trial, but things go terribly wrong when another body is found, Joe begins seeing a therapist, and a young woman asks Allison for confidence.

programme.title: Medium: Heads Will Roll
programme.desc: Devalos deals with the aftermath of the case, Joe is approached by a lawyer, and Allison makes the decision to confide in Debra.

programme.title: Medium: Everything Comes To A Head
programme.desc: Allison’s life is turned upside down when her psychic powers are revealed to the public.

programme.title: Medium: And Then
programme.desc: Now that Allison's special abilities have been revealed to the public, everyone's lives have been turned upside down.

programme.title: Medium: But For The Grace of God
programme.desc: Allison tries to help investigator Cynthia Keener find a missing teenage girl. Meanwhile, Ariel dreams of Allison's high school days from the '80s.
programme.sub-title: But For The Grace of God

programme.title: Medium: To Have And To Hold
programme.desc: Joe brings a reluctant Allison with him to a party at a prospective employer's house. Later on, the employer's daughter disappears, leading Allison to connect her recent dreams about Paris to the disappearance.

programme.title: Medium: Do You Hear What I Hear
programme.desc: A young deaf girl is kidnapped, causing Allison to completely lose her hearing. With Allison at a loss, Joe decides to help her and Cynthia Keener investigate the kidnapping.
programme.sub-title: Do You Hear What I Hear

programme.title: Medium: Girls Ain't Nothing But Trouble
programme.desc: Larry Watt, a defense attorney who has caused trouble in Allison's past, asks Allison to be a consultant for him. Low on money, Allison accepts his offer.

programme.title: Medium: Aftertaste
programme.desc: Devalos tries to reclaim the D.A.'s office. Allison's support of Devalos is tested when she has visions of Devalos' strongest political supporter involved in a horrible conspiracy.

programme.title: Medium: Burn, Baby Burn - Part 1
programme.desc: Joe's mother pays a surprise visit, which worries Allison because she hasn't seen her since her psychic abilities became public knowledge.

programme.title: Medium: Burn, Baby Burn - Part 2
programme.desc: Allison tries to find the link between Ariel's prediction of a classmate's mother's death, dreams related to her case with Cynthia, and Devalos' murder case.

programme.title: Medium: Wicked Game - Part 1
programme.desc: While working to locate a missing local girl, Allison learns about secrets from Cynthia Keener's past.

programme.title: Medium: Wicked Game - Part 2
programme.desc: A shocking and brutal conclusion awaits Allison and Cynthia as they delve into the decade-old case of the kidnapping and murder of Cynthia's daughter.

programme.title: Medium: Lady Killer
programme.desc: As Allison teams up with Scanlon to track down the dangerous cougar they believe is responsible for the murders of young men, she also has visions that Devalos' campaign is in jeopardy.

programme.title: Medium: Partners In Crime
programme.desc: When Joe presents his new solar power-based invention to an investment firm, he piques the interest of venture capitalist Meghan Doyle.

programme.title: Medium: A Cure For What Ails You
programme.desc: Allison has visions of a friend of Scanlon and Lynn DiNovi dying in a home mishap.
programme.sub-title: A Cure For What Ails You

programme.title: Medium: Car Trouble
programme.desc: Allison meets Meghan Doyle, Joe's new business partner. Meanwhile, her old car stops working and Joe surprises her with a nice looking used car.

programme.title: Medium: Being Joey Carmichael
programme.desc: Allison has dreams that help Scanlon in his search to find out who killed a wealthy local drug dealer.

programme.title: Medium: Drowned World
programme.desc: In the fourth season finale, Allison tries to help a young couple who thinks their house is haunted, but her efforts result in murder.

programme.title: Medium: Pilot
programme.desc: Allison, a pre-law student, and mother of three discover that she is able to help the helpless, but not by using her law books.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Kevin is called to a challenging recovery: a 75-tonne crane stranded in the countryside.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: Vehicles in need of recovery include a Land Rover Discovery dumped in a canal.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: Just outside Newcastle, Kev is sent to rescue a wheelie bin delivery truck that is stuck.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire, rookie op Euan is tasked with rescuing a ten-tonne rigid.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: A toppled tanker loaded with liquid chicken guts needs rescuing.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: A fuel tanker has rolled down a steep, muddy hill and must be flipped over.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: Recovery op Steve must deal with a mattress-stuffed lorry which has hit a low bridge.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: A three-tonne passenger ferry is hauled out of the icy waters of a lake for repairs,

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Recovery op Mark tackles a Vauxhall left dangling over the edge of a narrow canal lock.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: In Croydon, Stu has a complex recovery: a bin lorry is stuck in deep mud.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: A fully loaded 26-tonne tanker gets stuck in a waterlogged verge on the busy A5.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: Two coaches which tried passing each other on a narrow snowy lane come to grief.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: Kevin is winching a tanker which is leaning perilously close to an ancient wall.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: Rescuing a burnt-out low loader and portacabin and a bus blocking a mini roundabout.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: Steve tackles an emergency when a lorry deposits a hazardous load.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: A 46-tonne artic has veered into a verge on a busy road and is going nowhere without help.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: A 14-ton road sweeper needs recovering on a farmyard.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: Action in this episode includes a burning truck full of bricks on the A69.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: The Alpha Recovery team face a challenge as a double decker bus has rolled onto its side,

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful `Avatar State' as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation. But it's more difficult than Aang thinks.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: On the way to Omashu, the kids meet some nomads who show them a shortcut through the `cave of two lovers'. When they get lost in the caves, they must trust in love to escape.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The kids return to Omashu so that Aang can learn Earthbending from King Bumi; however, when they get there, they are shocked to find the city is now in Fire Nation hands.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being `connected to the Earth' from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang and the gang discover an Earth town that celebrates `Avatar Day'. They learn that it is not a celebration of the Avatar, but a festival of anger for something Aang did in his past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: In search for an Earthbending teacher for Aang, the kids go to an underground Earthbending tournament where they encounter Toph, a blind, but powerful Earthbender.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Travelling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher. Meanwhile, Sokka gets himself in a jam.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert. Meanwhile, Uncle and Zuko seek help from an ancient secret society.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the kids can't take the easy way into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: A series of short stories that explore the individual adventures of Katara and Toph, Uncle, Sokka, Aang, Zuko, and Momo.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng when they try to show the Earth King the conspiracy taking place in his city. Zuko becomes seriously ill and has odd dreams as he faces a spiritual crisis.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: A guru at the Eastern Air Temple helps Aang take the next step in his Avatar journey. Plus, Sokka meets his long-lost father, Azula hatches a diabolical plan, and Uncle and Zuko open a tea shop.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Everyone races against time to stop Azula's sinister conquest of Ba Sing Se. Zuko and Katara spend time together, while Aang's destiny hangs in the balance, as does Zuko's.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: To better camouflage themselves as real Fire Nation citizens, the kids check out a Fire Nation school. Also, Zuko confronts Uncle.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The gang arrive at a suffering Fire Nation fishing village, and a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael vs. The Volcano
programme.desc: Raphael, convinced he is dying due to a faulty reading by Donatell's Health-O-Meter, becomes do-gooder THE Green Defender, popping up around the city foiling crime.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Duplicate
programme.desc: Donatello creates an egotistical Clone of himself who stuffs Donatello in a trunk.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ice Creature Cometh
programme.desc: Bebop dumps a vat of mutagen into the Arctic ice, creating a gigantic Ice Monster, who Krang unleashes on the city to help him steal thermal nuclear devices to free the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Cuts Loose
programme.desc: Muscleman fiend Wally Airhead captures Turtles with a runaway exercise machine trap to add their powers to his race of super musclemen, but Turtles escape.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pirate Radio
programme.desc: Krang plots to take city by luring citizens into an inter­dimensional "Krang's Chasm" at sea by inserting Shredder in place of DJ. Dickie Bark as a Pied Piper on steamship radio station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael, the Turtle of a Thousand Faces
programme.desc: Raphael disguises himself as Mad Dog McNutt, who is planning a heist of the Natural History museum.
programme.sub-title: Raphael, the Turtle of a Thousand Faces

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo, the Renaissance Turtle
programme.desc: Professor Mindbender fools the Mayor into installing Lex, a supercop robot, to clean up crime, but rewires him to arrest practically the whole city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Zach and the Alien Invaders
programme.desc: Zach's over-active imagination has him seeing Aliens everywhere. Sent to Military School, he discovers actual Aliens posing as officers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Welcome Back, Polarisoids!
programme.desc: The Polarisoids return to Earth unwittingly invited by Krang, bringing to life the alien Creatures caught as images on tape as a distraction so Krang can break into the city's computer systems.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtleloids: Part 1
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder transport to the City Wild Animal Park with Bebop and Rocksteady to create an army of Mutants from the animals there.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rock Around the Block
programme.desc: Krang summons General Tragg from the Dimension X to keep the Turtles busy while Shredder places a remote control transmitter upon a rocket ship preparing to launch a satellite with a new super laser.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Krangenstein Lives
programme.desc: Under the Arctic Ocean Krang is tuning up his Robotic Body. While no one is looking, Bebop and Rocksteady inadvertently destroy an important computer chip and surreptitiously replace it with one from a video game.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Irma
programme.desc: While the Turtles are busy trying to decide what costumes to wear to this year's Channel Six Halloween party, April and Irma are doing a story on the reverse polarity magnet at Magno-Dyne Labs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Adventures in Turtle-Sitting
programme.desc: While Splinter is away on meditative satori, Donatello sets his sights on solving world hunger. He invents the food revivafiver, a device designed to reverse the aging process of food.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sword of Yurikawa
programme.desc: Krang plans to blow up the Tri-State Bridge just as a convoy of trucks carrying a rare form of toxic waste passes overhead.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Turtleoid
programme.desc: The Turtles go to the Top Notch Scientific Corporation to stand guard over the sonic disintegrator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shreeka's Revenge
programme.desc: Shreeka, an alien with an attitude and a vendetta against Krang, after having spent eons tracking him down, has finally found him.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Donatello tells the other three Turtles that, based on his calculations, the Earth has changed its orbit and is heading for the Sun.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Nightmare in the Lair
programme.desc: Down in the sewers, while Michelangelo, Leonardo, and Raphael are watching yet another cheesy sci-fi film, Donatello is busy building the dream-o-vision.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Phantom of the Sewers
programme.desc: After another night's performance of the robotic Willie Wombat Revue at the Willie Wombat Revue Theatre, a mysterious figure, wearing a long black cape, black fedora, white face mask, and known only as the Phantom, makes an appearance.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo is Missing
programme.desc: When Donatello, Michelangelo, and Raphael return from the video arcade they discover that Donatello's lab is in disarray and Leonardo is missing.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Snakes Alive!
programme.desc: While practicing their martial arts, Leonardo tells Splinter that he is convinced that there is one combat maneuver he has yet to teach the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Polly Wanna Pizza
programme.desc: Michelangelo returns from his sojourn to the pet shop with a monkey named Clyde. After only a few minutes with the undisciplined pet Leonardo, Donatello and Raphael demand that it be returned to the pet shop.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: Burne assigns April a story reporting on the increase in urban crime. The only problem is that urban crime is decreasing.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sleuth on the Loose
programme.desc: While the Turtles are watching their favorite TV show April interrupts the broadcast with a special bulletin about a break-in at Dynamic Science Labs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rust Never Sleeps
programme.desc: Krang works on an oxidizer rocket with enough power to blast the Technodrome to Earth, but something goes wrong, and instead of thrust, the device grows rust.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Real Snow Job
programme.desc: The Turtles are holidaying in the Alps, as Splinter goes off to a nearby mountain to meditate. April is in an Alpine village with Irma when she notices the ice and snow melting, unusual for this time of year.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Venice on the Half-Shell
programme.desc: Krang decides to use a hydrofluxer device to flood Venice, holding it for ransom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Artless
programme.desc: Two snobbish art-collecting aliens arrive in Florence and begin stealing great works of art.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Krang sends Shredder to set up a special lens that will focus the sun's rays to create a devastating heat ray.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Irish Jig Is Up
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder decide to use Ireland as their base for the Technodrome. With a device called the Rainbow Trans-Charmer, the villains intend to turn harmless little creatures like sheep and rabbits into slavering beasts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's New Sword
programme.desc: In Dimension X Krang is using a long-range scanner and discovers a rare metal buried in a ruined castle in England. The metal turns out to be King Arthur's legendary sword, Excalibur.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Lost Queen of Atlantis
programme.desc: Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop are searching for a valuable energy source in Athens and discover that it is April's new necklace.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on the Orient Express
programme.desc: April is covering the revival of the Orient Express. Shredder is on the train with Rocksteady and Bebop carrying the supercharger, a device to accelerate the train to super speed.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Gets in Dutch
programme.desc: April is covering the showing of the world-famed Duchess Diamond. Krang wants the diamond, a flawless stone, to focus the rays on his laser dimension blade.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Northern Lights Out
programme.desc: Eric Red seizes both April and Professor Swenson's map to the underground volcanoes in Scandinavia to tap into the molten energy and melt the polar ice caps.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Elementary, My Dear Turtle
programme.desc: The Turtles are in England, when they are taken back to the past, via an experimental atomic clock and must team up with Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson in order to get the clock back and return to the present.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Night of the Dark Turtle
programme.desc: When Donatello receives a jolt of electrical energy, he undergoes a radical personality transformation, turning into 'The Dark Turtle', a psychotic caped crimefighter on a mission of revenge against Shredder!

programme.title: Riptide: It's A Vial Sort Of Business
programme.desc: The guys are hired by a couple who are concerned that their son who was going to college dropped out and went to work in a fast food restaurant.
programme.sub-title: It's A Vial Sort Of Business

programme.title: Riptide: Peter Pan Is Alive And Well
programme.desc: When the Riptide agency is hired to catch a thief in a luxerous beach club, they come across an old lifeguard pal of Cody's.
programme.sub-title: Peter Pan Is Alive And Well

programme.title: Riptide: Catch A Fallen Star
programme.desc: When a mobster's son is out to kill a former actress the boys protect and help her to retrieve the property deed to Pier 56.

programme.title: Riptide: Gams People Play
programme.desc: A woman entering a beauty contest is threathened by an unknown adversary and the Riptide boys are hired to catch this person.

programme.title: Riptide: Prisoner Of War
programme.desc: Nick's new girlfriend runs away after witnessing a pedestrian get run over with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Riptide: Baxter And Boz
programme.desc: The boys are hired by the owner of a helicopter manufacturing business to expose some of his employees, who are covering up a dangerous design flaw.

programme.title: Riptide: Curse Of The Mary Aberdeen
programme.desc: A man who is supposed to be dead for eighteen years, hires the Riptide boys to find the Mary Aberdeen "before it kills again".

programme.title: Riptide: Boz Busters
programme.desc: When Murray is offered a dream job in computer research he leaves the agency and then goes missing. Nick and Cody set out to find him.

programme.title: Riptide: Oil Bets Are Off
programme.desc: When an oil magnet is murdered and the police aren't doing much about it, the Riptide agency is off to get some answers for the daughter of the deceased.

programme.title: Riptide: Girls Night Out
programme.desc: Two suburban women who owe money to a lone shark are forced to become burglars to pay him back.

programme.title: Riptide: Polly Want An Explanation
programme.desc: The Riptide agency, a wannabe-FBI agent, trouble prone con man Mack McPherson and his parrot all get in trouble with organized crime.

programme.title: Riptide: The Twisted Cross
programme.desc: A woman hires the guys to help her see her son whom her ex husband refuses to let her. They learn that the father is teaching his son to be a Nazi.

programme.title: Riptide: Fuzzy Vision
programme.desc: After the Riptide breaks down, the boys end up in a weird little town where a woman who can see into the future is suspected of murder.

programme.title: Riptide: Arrivederci, Baby
programme.desc: Nick "the pilot, Cody " the mustache" and Bozo "the docter" help Murray's Italian friend Angelo Guirilini, when his son is badly wounded.

programme.title: Riptide: Harmony And Grits
programme.desc: A seminar about harmony and communucation leads -apart from a fistfight and a bunch of arguments- to a concerned wife who's afraid her husband is having an affair.

programme.title: Riptide: Wipe Out
programme.desc: A so-called accident that took the life of a young surfer in 1964, causes repercussions today.

programme.title: Riptide: Thirty-Six Hours Till Dawn
programme.desc: Luitenant Quinlan and his superiors hire the Riptide Agency to pick up a female witness, ready to testify against her crooked husband.

programme.title: Riptide: Does Not Compute
programme.desc: When somebody is using computers to destroy the reputation of a congressman with controversial ideas, our private investigators decide to help out.

programme.title: Mr. D: Culture Day
programme.desc: Culture Day at Xavier and each teacher has been asked to model their classroom after a country. Gerry pushes for Scotland, only to find that Dwyer already has it.

programme.title: Mr. D: Strip Club
programme.desc: Gerry suspects that Dwyer is moonlighting as a stripper and there's only one way to find out for sure. Gerry and Simon are going to spend a night at the strip club...an all male strip club.

programme.title: Mr. D: Slam Dunk
programme.desc: Gerry tries to convince Bobbi to give him a senior boys basketball team next season. Robert learns that his year end evaluation came with one complaint.

programme.title: Mr. D: Parent Teacher Night
programme.desc: Gerry has only one opportunity to meet a hockey legend and have his priceless Team Canada jersey autographed.

programme.title: Mr. D: Old School
programme.desc: Gerry helps Lisa in her faculty fashion show.

programme.title: Mr. D: Donor Dinner
programme.desc: Gerry tries to charm and gain the support of Xavier Academy's most generous philanthropist.

programme.title: Mr. D: Assistant Leung
programme.desc: Gerry is forced to appoint Mr. Leung as his new assistant coach.

programme.title: Mr. D: Food Drive
programme.desc: Gerry is determined to make sure he wins the prize for Food Drive Month at Xavier Academy.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Gets Gym
programme.desc: Gerry is asked to temporarily fill in for an absent phys-ed teacher.

programme.title: Mr. D: Self Defense
programme.desc: Gerry 'helps' Bobbi with her girls’ self defense class.

programme.title: Mr. D: Graduation
programme.desc: Gerry has a positive interview for a position with Xavier’s main rival school.

programme.title: Mr. D: Mafia Dad
programme.desc: Gerry is finally given an opportunity to coach the varsity boys’ basketball team but finds himself in an awkward position with a player’s dad.

programme.title: Mr. D: Staff Hangover
programme.desc: Morning assembly reveals the Xavier staff in rough shape. Last night’s staff party went late and got messy.

programme.title: Mr. D: President Jimmy
programme.desc: Gerry becomes unexpectedly embroiled in the school’s student council election and is forced to seek the help of an old foe.

programme.title: Mr. D: Callaghan’s Daughter
programme.desc: Callaghan’s daughter is in town visiting, and after seeing her old graduation photo, Gerry wants take her out on a date.

programme.title: Mr. D: Dating Maya Student
programme.desc: Gerry’s former pupil, Maya is back at Xavier as a student teacher and Gerry is having difficulty accepting her as an adult.

programme.title: Mr. D: Short Stocked
programme.desc: Gerry and Bill’s house they rent is up for sale and Gerry uses the advice of a market-savvy student raise enough money for a down payment.

programme.title: Mr. D: Corporal Punishment
programme.desc: Gerry’s father Francis visits Xavier, and Gerry decides to take a page from his father’s book when dealing with an insubordinate student.

programme.title: Mr. D: Lockdown
programme.desc: After encountering an attractive police officer during a lockdown drill, Gerry is determined to see her again.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry’s Kid
programme.desc: Gerry bumps into an old fling and her daughter and becomes convinced he’s met the child he never knew he had.

programme.title: Mr. D: Teacher Conference
programme.desc: Gerry meets an attractive woman at Barrel’s and drags Lisa with him to a teacher conference in Atlantic City to find her.

programme.title: Takeshi's Castle Thailand: Episode 6
programme.desc: Wet paint, Human Velcro, Foot Loose, Tug Of War, Turtle Path, Slip Way, Bridge Ball, Final Fall, Final Attack the castle.

programme.title: Takeshi's Castle Thailand: Episode 7
programme.desc: Slippery Wall, Star Bowling, Flying mushroom, Bridge Ball, Slip Way, Sumo, Bridge the Gap, Final Attack the castle.

programme.title: Takeshi's Castle Thailand: Episode 8
programme.desc: Turtle Path, Knock Knock, Runaway Rockaway, Wet paint, Human Velcro, Honeycomb, Stepping Stone, Final Fall, Final Attack the castle.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Follow Me
programme.desc: Featuring Follow Me; Bus Trip

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Nothing Happening
programme.desc: Featuring Nothing Happening; Shortcuts; Special Delivery

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Take a Lap
programme.desc: Featuring Take a Lap; Bride of Butt-Head.

programme.title: Billy On The Street: Miracle on 34th Street with Andy Samberg!
programme.desc: Billy and Andy Samberg play the new game Was at My Wedding or Possibly Killed Tupac?; Billy and Andy introduce New Yorkers to some new superheroes; Kevin the busboy joins Billy to play Fox News Anchor or Pilgrim?
programme.sub-title: Miracle on 34th Street with Andy Samberg!

programme.title: Billy On The Street: Aziz on the Street!
programme.desc: Billy welcomes Aziz Ansari to play the brand new game Is This a Kanye West Quote or Not?. Rachel Dratch returns for an exhilarating obstacle course.

programme.title: Billy On The Street: Billy's Holiday Wonderland with Jacob Tremblay
programme.desc: Billy is joined for the first time by a child actor, the star of \\"Room,\\" Jacob Tremblay. Together, Jacob and Billy take to the street for a brand new \\"Lightning Round.\\"
programme.sub-title: Billy's Holiday Wonderland with Jacob Tremblay

programme.title: Billy On The Street: Do Gay People Care About John Oliver? With John Oliver
programme.desc: John Oliver joins Billy out on his street ventures. Billy asks gay people what they think about the famed English comic and host.
programme.sub-title: Do Gay People Care About John Oliver? With John Oliver

programme.title: Billy On The Street: Curbside Conga Line with James Corden!
programme.desc: Talk-show host James Corden helps Billy appeal to the masses; Billy and actor Robin Lord Taylor (\\"Gotham\\") play an obstacle course called \\"Can You Separate the Art from the Artist?\\"; other games include \\"For a Dollar.\\"
programme.sub-title: Curbside Conga Line with James Corden!

programme.title: Billy On The Street: Super Sloppy Semi-Automatic Double Dare! With Keegan-Michael Key
programme.desc: Billy is joined by Keegan-Michael Key for the game \\"Name 10 Gay People\\"; aspiring actor Cameron plays \\"Walking Dead or Talking Dead?\\"; Key competes in a new obstacle course.\\"
programme.sub-title: Super Sloppy Semi-Automatic Double Dare! With Keegan-Michael Key

programme.title: Billy On The Street: The NY Bubble with Stephen Colbert!
programme.desc: Billy welcomes Stephen Colbert to play \\"La La Land or Nicki Minaj\\", and Stephen heads out onto the streets to ask how New Yorkers feel about Donald Trump. Plus, Elena returns to answer Twitter questions.
programme.sub-title: The NY Bubble with Stephen Colbert!

programme.title: Broad City: Jews on a Plane
programme.desc: When Abbi gets her period while on an airplane, she and Ilana go to extreme lengths to find a tampon.

programme.title: Broad City: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: On a spring day in 2011, Abbi and Ilana meet for the first time.

programme.title: Broad City: Twaining Day
programme.desc: Abbi's brief return to Soulstice gets interesting when she's given the training opportunity that she's always dreamed of. Meanwhile, Ilana gets a new job at a restaurant.

programme.title: Broad City: Just the Tips
programme.desc: Ilana goes on a spending spree with her waitressing cash, and Abbi basks in the glow of a new relationship. Later that night, the girls bump into an old friend at a party.

programme.title: Drawn Together: Gay Bash
programme.desc: The roommates encourage Xandir to discover his true sexual identity.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Stung
programme.desc: Using a local car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants. One of the criminals they capture tries to bargain for a lighter sentence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: In Plain View
programme.desc: When a police informant is found murdered, 15 Division sets its sights on finding a weak link in the notoriously brutal East Jameson gang. Andy has to work closely with Detective Jo Rosati, a woman who seems far too interested in Andy’s fiancé, Luke.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: When a woman gets brutally attacked in the same manner as deceased rookie cop Zoe Martinelli. Det. Luke Callaghan is convinced that it’s the same suspect.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Monster
programme.desc: After a seemingly drunken man collapses in the barn, 15 Division is put under quarantine. Andy and Swarek work together to find the accomplice of a dyed blue bank robber

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Dov and Gail work together under Swarek’s expert tutelage in a stake-out operation to stop an Asian gang from killing a snitch.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: 15 Division’s hunt for an armed robber leads them to the scene of a horrible car accident. While Andy deals with a woman pinned in her car, the other officers must track and apprehend the fugitive

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Unfriendly Skies
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a passenger aboard a commercial airliner. They soon realize that the forensic evidence and passenger statements don't quite add up.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Sex, Lies And Larvae
programme.desc: Sara and Grissom investigate the death of a woman, Kaye Shelton, found wrapped in a blanket in the mountains. With no way to confirm the time of death, Grissom relies on the insects found on her body to establish a timeline.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: I-15 Murders
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of Margaret Shorey at a supermarket, Grissom and Catherine stumble upon a serial killer who claims to have killed five women in supermarkets located along the I-15.

programme.title: Law & Order: The Troubles
programme.desc: Detectives and prosecutors pursue murder charges against a suspected IRA member.

programme.title: Law & Order: Sonata for Solo Organ
programme.desc: Greevey and Logan find that an apparent mugging victim has had his kidney removed.

programme.title: Law & Order: The Blue Wall
programme.desc: Captain Cragen ends up in the cross-hairs of an investigation into evidence tampering.

programme.title: Law & Order: Confession
programme.desc: Greevey is murdered and an angry Logan pressures a confession out of the killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: The Wages of Love
programme.desc: Prosecutors believe a woman's son can uncover the truth of a shooting.

programme.title: Law & Order: Aria
programme.desc: An aspiring actress dies from a drug overdose. Was her mother responsible?

programme.title: Law & Order: Asylum
programme.desc: After a homeless man is convicted of murder, his lawyer files a Fourth Amendment appeal.

programme.title: Law & Order: God Bless the Child
programme.desc: A couple denies medical attention to their dying daughter.

programme.title: Law & Order: Misconception
programme.desc: Cerreta and Logan investigate a lawyer who may have been involved in an assault.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: When his daughter takes part in an anti-nuclear rally, Kessler is suspected of leaking classified information that leads directly to nuclear sabotage.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: ICS must find a sadistic kidnapper before he auctions off his 12-year-old victim on a pedophile website.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Dizzy Heights!
programme.desc: The Geordie's throw a house party! Beau chooses Bethan over Abbie, which leads to Chloe and Nathan falling out - Again! Scott decides team bonding's needed so sends them both abseiling. (S19, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Fight Night!
programme.desc: Nathan throws a surprise for Tahlia, his single bestie. Aaron calls the house and invites the family to support him at his first MMA fight in Newcastle. (S19, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Shake Ups and Break Ups!
programme.desc: Chloe and Sam have split and the squad are worried how it's going to impact the family. James and Abbie return but their first night out ends in disaster when Beau tells Bethan it's over! (S20, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Give It Another Go!
programme.desc: Sam realises he has to sit down with Chloe so they leave the house for an honest chat. They decide to give things another go but the news doesn't go down well with the rest of the house! (S20, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Tensions Keep Rising
programme.desc: Chloe confronts the girls about not supporting her. Sam's behaviour on a lads night out leads to them splitting up, again! Abbie tells James she saw Chloe get with a lad in Ibiza. (S20, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Party in Portugal
programme.desc: Sam makes a big decision when the squad are told they're off to Portugal. The family live their best lives on the Algarve, but tension between Bethan, Beau and Abbie threatens to boil over. (S20, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Agg on the Algarve
programme.desc: Bethan and Abbie's row impacts on the house, and it all kicks off when Nat calls Bethan and Beau's relationship 'toxic'. The Geordie's get stuck into the Sangria and tear up the strip! (S20, ep5)

programme.title: Deadly Friends

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Rampant Rats/Extreme Fingernails
programme.desc: Theresa has more than 60 pet hairless rats that are taking over her apartment. Jazz has been growing her fingernails for 22 years. Her longest nail is two feet long, and she calls them her children.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Grown-Up Baby
programme.desc: Stanley, 31, has been obsessed with being an adult baby for the past 18 years. Every day he wears footie pajamas, eats baby food, wears a diaper and sleeps in a crib.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Ketchup_Mustard
programme.desc: Ketchup or Mustard? Barry owns the world’s largest mustard collection numbering 5,500 bottles from 80 countries. Ralph’s rare collection of Ketchup bottles includes a patent bottle from 1891.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: The Cat's House_My Oval Office
programme.desc: Frances and Bob share their house with nine felines who they raise like children. Ron is obsessed with U.S. presidents. He’s even built a replica of the oval office in his home.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Since leaving home 26 year old Kevin Calladine hasn't had a decent meal. Short on time and money his weight has plummeted to just 8 stone 7lbs and he's two stones underweight.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Supersized Alyson Mawunga swaps her colossal portions and sugary snacks with superskinny Nick Wood, who lives off caffeine drinks and little else.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Keith is a 33 year old dance floor DJ who is desperate for a date. 25 year old BT Manager Tiffany despises ‘bad’ foods. She has a strong desire to be healthy but has a very small appetite.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Tonight we’re revisiting some of the major success stories from the last series of Supersize Vs Superskinny.Junk food addict Andy Stain, his diet swap partner too busy to eat mum Hannah Ames and Caffeine quaffingJade Potts.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: 39 year old Tracey from Tonbridge in Kent spent 22 years trying to get pregnant and the emotional anxiety led to her weight ballooning to over 18 stone.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Fussy freaky eaters put up a food fight in the feeding clinic as Superskinny Yasmin Smith is forced to swallow a gargantuan diet of snack foods and diet drinks.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: 41 year old Trudy from Bedfordshire runs her own business and is a mum of three. Kim is a fitness fanatic who runs 45 miles a week but eats like a sparrow.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: It's the mother of all food fights in the feeding clinic as Superskinny carb-phobic Amy Jo Saunders faces up to snackaholic man mountain, thirty eight and a half stoner Andy Duckworth

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: In the feeding clinic Louise Knox, queen of convenience food, meets Carly Pitman, who's so busy she never finds the time to eat.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: This week it’s non stop tears and tantrums as 21 stone 5lbs LouiseHayes is forced to swap her normal 5-6 course feasts for superskinny Josh Evans‘s diet which barely features a proper meal.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Pressure Is Building
programme.desc: There's havoc in the ER again when a boy is rushed in after breathing in an unspecified poisonous chemical. Has it permanently damaged his lungs?

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: No Down Time
programme.desc: Dr. Castillo thought he had seen it all in the ER, until a seven-foot tall man is brought into the ER, blind drunk and unconscious.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: I Can't Remember
programme.desc: A patient can't remember the past 20 years, but in order to treat her, her doctor desperately needs to know what she's forgotten. After reviving his cardiac arrest victim, a doctor packs him in ice, hoping to preserve his brain function.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: ER RUNAROUND
programme.desc: A patient appears to be hallucinating and sends ER staff on a wild goose chase around the hospital; a doctor gets a jolt of electricity that stops his heart when he touches a patient who is being defibrillated.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: A Scary Feeling
programme.desc: A teenage boy is brought in with a live cockroach stuck in his ear canal and a 20-year-old man seeks help after slicing his hand with a saw.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Hooked Alive
programme.desc: When a four-pound steel hook impales the skull of construction worker Gail Creek, trauma surgeon Joe Eric Johnston has the impossible task of keeping the man alive.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Stuck In A Toilet
programme.desc: A woman is stuck for over 18 hours in a toilet bowl; doctors struggle to save the life of a man who's been mangled by a stump grinder; when a nurse collapses in the hospital, doctors and staff make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: PRIDEtv

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Pearl Island
programme.desc: Paul and Jane are looking for an extreme luxury property with a lot of privacy.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Mexican Heaven
programme.desc: Tav and Mike team up once again to find unique opportunities in Canada as well villas in Los Cabos, Mexico.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Hotel Vie
programme.desc: Laura Compagni teams up with Mataj Architects and The Parentela Family to introduce the first of the Hotel Vie chain of luxury hotels.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Condo
programme.desc: Downsizing can be a difficult transition & Jin's objective is to make it as seamless as possible. In this episode, Jin is getting outdoors by practicing archery with Mike but mostly just to compete for bragging rights.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: King's Obsession
programme.desc: It is time to upsize! Daryl's client is moving away from downtown Toronto because they desire a bigger space, more privacy, & tranquility.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Rose Garden
programme.desc: Mike's couple is looking for their luxurious dream home anywhere in between Toronto & Barrie near HWY 400 in a prestigious neighborhood. They have a large dog, tall family, & want to start a family of their own.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Smart Investment
programme.desc: An amazing beachfront property is what Inez's couple is looking for & these top million dollar agents are sure to surpass their expectations.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Bucket List
programme.desc: Mike's friend invites him to an Indian wedding & tells him about his uncle who is looking for a luxury condo close to the airport. Daryl, Inez, & Jin support & donate to Mike's charity.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Right Choice
programme.desc: Somewhere to spend the rest of their days surrounded by nature sounds like a paradise to retire in. Daryl & Jin play some golf to discuss a potential listing she has found & Mike aids Inez in purchasing a new vehicle.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Big City Home
programme.desc: A young trendy couple wants to start a family in Toronto but they need some help from these top million dollar agents. Jin is a natural daredevil & has always wanted to skydive with her clients.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: City Dreams
programme.desc: Moving in together can be stressful but fun because you are starting a new life together! Inez's client is selling their separate properties & looking for a house or condo.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Cottage Getaways
programme.desc: Agreeing on a vacation home is made much harder when these top million dollar agents have astounding listings. Mike's client is looking for a waterfront cottage.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Perfect Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Remarrying is hard enough let alone combining two families under one roof. With a total of 4 children between the ages of 7 & 16 Jin's client is definitely going to need lots of space & land in a safe neighborhood.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Now that Kristen & Kane have opened an office in Toronto, they will be travelling a lot from Vancouver & want somewhere of their own to stay in.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Classic Homes Are Timeless
programme.desc: Many people enjoy staying busy & always having a project on the go. Inez's client loves to build & create breathtaking properties. On their next project, this couple wants an interesting property.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Agents of Million Dollar Homes
programme.desc: Deborah & Vezi are an international couple that want to live in Toronto for one year but has no idea where to start looking. Luckily for them Mike, Jin, Daryl, & Inez have teamed up to find them the home of their dreams.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Glass House (Part 1)
programme.desc: The King is back, baby! Daryl King is known to make an entrance, and he wants the houses he shows to have that same "wow" factor. His clients are looking for a grand mansion

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Glass House (Part 2)
programme.desc: Will Daryl be able to dazzle his clients and find a property that will take their breath away?

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 1)
programme.desc: International luxury realtor Mike Donia jets off to Thailand to work with a client and good friend of his, Mae. She is moving back to her hometown of Bangkok to pursue her modeling career, and is looking for the house of her dreams.
programme.sub-title: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 1)

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: With the help of a Bangkok real estate expert, Max Gloeckner, Mike is confident he can deliver just what Mae is looking for. This episode features the last two of four properties.
programme.sub-title: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 2)

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Infinite View (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vicky is searching for a home in The Beaches for her and her family. No one knows the Beach like Inez Kudryk, so Vicky enlists her help in finding some stunning luxury properties to tour.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Infinite View (Part 2)
programme.desc: Will Vicky find the forever home of her dreams? This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase and special appearances by guest agent Jasmine Xuereb.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sunset on the Patio (Part 1)
programme.desc: Steve Bailey to save the day! This week's episode features the lovely couple Chris and Rosa as they search for the perfect home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sunset on the Patio (Part 2)
programme.desc: Unfortunately for Rosa, she isn't seeing the benefits of moving to a town around Cambridge. Steve's got some neat ideas, but will they be able to convince Rosa? This episode features the last two of four properties.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Home Belize (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sofie Kehdi heads to the island of Ambergris Caye, Belize to help a friend and former client, actress and choreographer Zuzana Marosová. As a public figure, Zuzana craves privacy in her personal time and is looking for a relaxing space.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Home Belize (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the help of local realtor Daniel Hartin, Sofie sets her sights on the perfect home...and hopefully a bit of fun in the sun! This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the client decides to purchase.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Nice Family Home (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jessica and Mark are a young couple living and working in Thailand after meeting there several years ago and falling in love. They are looking for a permanent home in Bangkok, and after chatting with her friend Mae.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Nice Family Home (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the help of local agents Max Gloeckner and Nala Gill, will Mike be able to find a place that suits the whole family? This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Clever Income (Part 1)
programme.desc: After helping them find a home last season, Inez is enlisted by Martin and Cheryl to help them find the perfect investment property. While Cheryl wants a property with minimal work and no landlord responsibilities.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Clever Income (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with special guest appearances by interior design expert Shelley Alexanian and guest agent Mo Loulou.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Open Concept (Part 1)
programme.desc: This week's episode features Cambridge realtor extraordinaire Steve Bailey as he helps couple Dan and Melinda search for the perfect home. It's a real battle of contemporary vs. traditional as Dan and Melinda.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Open Concept (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with a special guest appearance by interior design expert Shelley Alexanian.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Big Investment (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vancouver-based couple Jim and Shannon are looking to relocate to their hometown of Toronto with their two daughters. With a budget of 10 million dollars, they enlist the help of savvy realtor Sofie Kehdi.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Big Investment (Part 2)
programme.desc: This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase, with a special appearance by guest agent Tyrone N. Steer.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Magical Home (Part 1)
programme.desc: Off on another adventure! This episode takes Mike Donia on a whirlwind tour of Southeast Asia as he searches for a home for his clients, Antonio and Kim. Featuring properties in Thailand.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Magical Home (Part 2)
programme.desc: Off on another adventure! This episode takes Mike Donia on a whirlwind tour of Southeast Asia as he searches for a home for his clients, Antonio and Kim. Featuring properties in Thailand.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Income for a Rainy Day (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vezi and Deborah love the house they purchased last season in Stouffville, but they are ready to make the move to the big city. They enlist the help of Inez Kudryk to show them the best properties she can find in Toronto.

programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.
